name: Reactor Slime
name_jp: リアクター・スライム
desc: During your Main Phase: You can activate this effect; Special Summon 2 "Slime Tokens" (Aqua/WATER/Level 1/ATK 500/DEF 500), also you cannot Normal or Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Divine-Beast monsters. During the Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; Set 1 "Metal Reflect Slime" from your hand, Deck, or GY. It can be activated this turn. You can only use each effect of "Reactor Slime" once per turn.
mnst_eff: During your Main Phase: You can activate this effect; Special Summon 2 "Slime Tokens" (Aqua/WATER/Level 1/ATK 500/DEF 500), also you cannot Normal or Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Divine-Beast monsters. During the Battle Phase (Quick Effect): You can Tribute this card; Set 1 "Metal Reflect Slime" from your hand, Deck, or GY. It can be activated this turn. You can only use each effect of "Reactor Slime" once per turn.
eff: During your Main Phase: You can activate this effect; Special Summon 2 "Slime Tokens" (Aqua/WATER/Level 1/ATK 500/DEF 500), also you cannot Normal or Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Divine-Beast monsters. You can only use each effect of "Reactor Slime" once per turn.

sets.set: Egyptian God Deck: Slifer the Sky Dragon
Speed Duel: Streets of Battle City

mst: Allows activation of Trap Cards the turn they were Set
summoning: Restricts the player's Normal Summons to Type specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
